subject: Applications Open – Google Summer Internship Program 2026
body: Applications are now open for the Google Summer Internship Program 2026 for undergraduate Computer Science students. This is a paid remote internship for students interested in Software Engineering, AI, and Cloud Computing. Eligibility: BS Computer Science / Software Engineering students, Minimum CGPA: 3.0, Strong programming skills in Python, Java, or C++, Good problem-solving skills. Required Documents: Updated CV, Academic Transcript, Cover Letter. Deadline: 20 April 2026. Apply here: https://careers.google.com/internships

subject: Merit Scholarship for High Achieving Students
body: The National Merit Scholarship Program is offering fully funded scholarships for students with outstanding academic records. Benefits: Full tuition fee coverage, Monthly stipend, Research grant support. Eligibility: Minimum CGPA: 3.5, Financial need preferred, Full-time enrolled student. Required Documents: Transcript, Income Certificate, Personal Statement, Recommendation Letter. Deadline: 18 April 2026. Contact: scholarships@nsp.org

subject: Registration Open – ACM Programming Contest 2026
body: FAST-NU is organizing the ACM Programming Contest 2026 for students interested in competitive programming. Eligibility: Any undergraduate student, Teams of 3 members. Benefits: Cash Prize, Internship opportunities, Certificates. Required: Team registration form, Student ID cards. Deadline: 25 April 2026. Venue: FAST Lahore Campus

subject: Student Exchange Opportunity – Erasmus+ 2026
body: Applications are invited for the Erasmus+ Semester Exchange Program in Europe. Eligibility: Minimum CGPA: 3.2, Completed at least 4 semesters, Good English proficiency. Benefits: Tuition waiver, Travel support, Monthly living stipend. Required Documents: Passport, Transcript, Motivation Letter, IELTS/English Proficiency Proof. Deadline: 30 April 2026.

subject: Research Assistant Required for AI Lab
body: The Artificial Intelligence Research Lab is hiring Research Assistants for Summer 2026. Eligibility: Strong Python knowledge, Machine Learning background, Minimum CGPA: 3.2. Responsibilities: Data preprocessing, Model training, Research paper assistance. Required: CV, Transcript, GitHub Profile. Deadline: 22 April 2026. Email applications to: ailab@university.edu

subject: Reminder – Cybersecurity Awareness Webinar Tomorrow
body: This is a reminder that the Cybersecurity Awareness Webinar will be held tomorrow at 2 PM in the main auditorium. Attendance is optional. No registration required.

subject: Attendance Shortage Notice
body: Your attendance in Database Systems has fallen below the required threshold. Please contact your course instructor immediately.

subject: Become a Microsoft Learn Student Ambassador
body: Applications are open for the Microsoft Learn Student Ambassador Program 2026. Benefits: Microsoft mentorship, Global networking, Free certifications, Leadership opportunities. Eligibility: Passion for technology, Community leadership, Strong communication skills. Required: Application form, LinkedIn Profile, Short motivation essay. Deadline: 28 April 2026. Apply: https://studentambassadors.microsoft.com

subject: Fully Funded Masters Admission in Germany
body: Applications are open for fully funded MS scholarships in Germany for Fall 2026 intake. Eligibility: Final year students or graduates, Strong academic record, IELTS preferred. Benefits: Tuition covered, Monthly stipend, Health insurance. Required: Passport, CV, SOP, Recommendation Letters. Deadline: 15 May 2026. Contact: admissions@germanedu.org

subject: Volunteers Needed for DevFest Lahore 2026
body: GDG Lahore is inviting volunteers for DevFest Lahore 2026. Benefits: Networking, Event certificates, Industry exposure. Eligibility: Interest in tech events, Good teamwork skills. Required: Registration form. Deadline: 24 April 2026. Venue: Lahore Expo Center

subject: Library Fine Pending
body: You have an overdue library fine of Rs. 850. Please clear the dues before next week.

subject: Startup Pitch Competition – Win Seed Funding
body: Entrepreneurship Society invites applications for the Startup Pitch Competition 2026. Benefits: Seed funding up to Rs. 200,000, Mentorship, Investor access. Eligibility: Innovative startup idea, Team participation allowed. Required: Pitch deck, Registration form. Deadline: 27 April 2026. Venue: Innovation Center

subject: Congratulations on Dean’s List Achievement
body: Congratulations! You have been placed on the Dean’s List for Spring 2026. Keep up the excellent work.

subject: UNICEF Youth Fellowship Applications Open
body: Applications are open for the UNICEF Youth Fellowship Program for students passionate about social impact and leadership. Benefits: Monthly stipend, International mentorship, Leadership training. Eligibility: Undergraduate students, Strong leadership potential, Community engagement preferred. Required: CV, Personal Statement, Recommendation Letter. Deadline: 29 April 2026. Apply through: https://unicef.org/fellowship

subject: Final Exam Schedule Released
body: The final examination schedule for Spring 2026 has been uploaded to the student portal. Please check your exam timings carefully.

subject: Google Summer Internship 2026 – Applications Now Open
body:
Subject: Google Summer Internship 2026 – Applications Now Open
Body: Dear Student,
We are excited to announce that applications for the Google Summer Internship 2026 are
now open. This is a 12-week paid internship program based in our Singapore office.
Application Deadline: May 15, 2026
Apply at: careers.google.com/students
Best regards,
Google University Programs Team

subject: Chevening Scholarship 2026 – Apply Now for UK Studies
body:
Subject: Chevening Scholarship 2026 – Apply Now for UK Studies
Body: Dear Student,
Applications for the Chevening Scholarship 2026 are now open. Chevening is the UK
government's international awards programme, offering fully funded scholarships to
outstanding students from around the world to pursue a one-year Masters degree at any
UK university.
Eligibility:
- Pakistani nationality
- Minimum two years of work experience
- Undergraduate degree equivalent to a UK 2:1
- Commitment to return to Pakistan after studies
Benefits:
- Full tuition fees covered
- Monthly living allowance
- Return flights to the UK
- Visa application fee reimbursement
Application Deadline: November 5, 2026
Apply at: chevening.org/apply
For queries contact: chevening@fcdo.gov.uk
Best regards,
Chevening Scholarships Team
FCDO, United Kingdom

subject: Meta University Internship Program 2026 – Applications Open
body:
Subject: Meta University Internship Program 2026 – Applications Open
Body: Dear Student,
Meta is thrilled to announce that applications for the Meta University Internship Program
2026 are now open. This is a 12-week summer internship designed for undergraduate and
graduate students passionate about building technology that connects people around the
world.
Available Roles:
- Software Engineer Intern
- Data Science Intern
- Product Management Intern
- UX Research Intern
Eligibility:
- Enrolled in a Bachelor's or Master's program
- Graduating between December 2026 and June 2028
- Minimum CGPA of 3.2 on a 4.0 scale
- Strong problem-solving and communication skills
Compensation & Benefits:
- Monthly stipend of $7,000 USD
- Free housing or housing allowance
- Round-trip flights covered
- Access to Meta's campus facilities and events
Application Deadline: March 31, 2026
Apply at: metacareers.com/students
For further information, contact: university@meta.com
We look forward to your application.
Warm regards,
Meta University Recruiting Team
